proposal1.heroHeadline: Mail is burning 1,000 hours a year on proposals. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, Mail spends hours manually crafting proposals. With our system, generate them in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each problem below highlights a critical ongoing loss for Mail.

problems.title: Wasted Sales Time
problems.description: Every hour spent on proposal writing is an hour not spent closing deals. Mail loses potential revenue opportunities due to this inefficiency.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent branding in proposals costs you deals. Unprofessional presentations can damage Mail's reputation and lead to lost clients.

problems.title: Manual Errors
problems.description: Errors in proposals cause confusion and mistrust. Each mistake can cost thousands in lost business opportunities for Mail.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Slow proposal turnaround times frustrate prospects. Each delay risks losing interest, resulting in potential revenue slipping away.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Manual proposal creation involves high labor costs. Paying for hours of work adds up, impacting Mail's bottom line significantly.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Every missed connection due to slow proposals means lost business. In a competitive market, delays can make prospects choose competitors instead.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all these inefficiencies with a streamlined process.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, creating a proposal takes hours of manual effort. Our system delivers a complete, branded proposal in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Branding inconsistencies can lose deals. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Mail's brand.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Manual processes invite errors. Our system generates precise proposals every time, eliminating costly mistakes.

solutions.title: Rapid Response
solutions.description: Delayed proposals lose clients. With our AI, respond instantly and keep prospects engaged with fast turnaround.

solutions.title: Reduced Labor Costs
solutions.description: Manual work inflates costs. Our automation cuts labor expenses, improving Mail's profitability.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Mail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Mail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Mail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Enhance Acme Corp's Lead Generation Efficiency with Mail's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a strategic engagement to optimize your customer acquisition processes and increase conversion rates.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is experiencing significant losses due to inefficient lead conversion.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without engaging is a potential customer lost. This could equate to losing up to 20% of your potential revenue.

problems.title: Inefficient Ad Spend
problems.description: Spending on ads that don't convert means wasted resources. This could be costing up to 15% of your marketing budget annually.

problems.title: Low Email Engagement
problems.description: Emails that aren't opened or clicked reduce your reach. This results in losing potential sales opportunities by 25%.

problems.title: Poor Customer Targeting
problems.description: Not reaching the right audience means missed connections. This can lead to a 30% decrease in potential leads.

problems.title: Inadequate CRM Utilization
problems.description: Not fully utilizing CRM capabilities leads to inefficient customer management, resulting in a 20% loss in repeat business.

problems.title: Limited Brand Awareness
problems.description: Without a strong brand presence, potential customers might choose competitors, leading to a 10% loss of market share.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these losses by enhancing lead generation and conversion efforts.

solutions.title: Advanced Lead Identification
solutions.description: Identify and target high-value prospects more effectively, minimizing wasted efforts on non-converting leads.

solutions.title: Strategic Ad Campaigns
solutions.description: Optimize ad spend by focusing on high-conversion channels, reducing waste and increasing ROI.

solutions.title: Enhanced Email Campaigns
solutions.description: Increase email engagement rates by segmenting audiences and personalizing content.

solutions.title: CRM Optimization
solutions.description: Leverage CRM tools to foster stronger customer relationships and improve retention rates.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Mail offers the technical expertise and strategic insight to transform Acme Corp's lead generation efforts.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team has a track record of enhancing lead generation for top-tier clients.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Approach
whyUsCards.description: We use data analytics to drive decision-making and deliver measurable results.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Focus
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize client goals and tailor strategies to meet your specific needs.

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Our services cover all aspects of digital marketing, ensuring a cohesive strategy.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to driving Acme Corp's success.

team.name: there
team.bio: With over a decade in digital strategy, I lead our client relationships and strategic initiatives. My focus is ensuring that our solutions align with your business goals.

process.title: Discovery & Strategy
